name: @nutgaard/bun-recording-shell
description: Record and replay Bun shell invocations for deterministic tests.

scripts.lint: biome check biome.json bunup.config.ts eslint.config.ts src package.json tsconfig.json README.md .changeset && eslint src/
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write biome.json bunup.config.ts eslint.config.ts src package.json tsconfig.json README.md .changeset && eslint src/ --fix
scripts.format: biome format --write biome.json bunup.config.ts eslint.config.ts src package.json tsconfig.json README.md .changeset
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.release: bun run build && npm publish --provenance --access public

author: Nicklas Utgaard
